heading.suffix: gamers rely on 99accs for their online gaming needs

items.title: Trusted Source
items.text: Providing Valorant accounts since 2021, we pride ourselves on delivering top-notch gaming experiences. With years of industry expertise, we've become a trusted source for high-quality accounts.

items.title: Global Delivery
items.text: Delivery of your purchase is carried out immediately after payment. Our soft operates around the clock, so there are no delays in delivery to any country of the world.

items.title: 24/7 Support
items.text: Our team is dedicated to offering continuous support to our customers via our advanced support system, which includes email support and a personalized member-specific support system.

items.title: Secure Warranty
items.text: All accounts purchased from our store come with a warranty at the time of sale. Should you encounter any issues, simply notify us, and we'll promptly provide you with a replacement account at no additional cost.
